subcodes.first_line: O ye two beholders of the Kingdom of God! Praise and thanksgiving be unto the Lord of the Kingdom, Who hath guided those two lovers of truth unto the realm of [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو ناظر بملکوت الله حمد وشکر رب ملکوت را که آن دو مفتون حقیقت را بجهان
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @light and darkness
